svg.title: Vibebreak gameplay preview
svg.desc: A terminal gameplay preview for Vibebreak showing a framed board, score chips, combo meter, and controls.

text.font-family: SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace
SFMono-Regular, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Menlo, monospace

svg.text: Catch useful tokens and leave the suspicious ones alone.
